text.title: Approval Token as Signed JWT Procedure

step.name: provision-issuer-key
step.action: Create ES256/EdDSA key in HSM/KMS; export public key for verifier.

step.name: define-scope-catalog
step.action: Enumerate every privileged action; assign `verb:resource` slug; commit to repo.

step.name: wire-issuer
step.action: Configure issuer to sign with KMS key; embed `aud`, `scope`, `exp`, `jti` claims.

step.name: wire-verifier
step.action: Configure verifier to validate signature + claims + nonce store + revocation list.

step.name: audit
step.action: Stream to tamper-evident log (S3 Object Lock / append-only).
